description: A disguised container file is located at /home/ga/evidence/server_backup.dat. This file is a GZIP compressed tarball containing a ZIP archive (payloads.zip), which contains two raw disk images (vm_disk_01.dd and usb_clone.dd). Conduct a forensic triage by creating a case named 'Archive_Triage_2024' (case number 'INV-ARC-002') in /home/ga/Cases/. Process the server_backup.dat file as a Logical File data source using the 'File Type Identification', 'Embedded File Extractor', 'Extension Mismatch Detector', and 'Hash Lookup' modules. Export the nested vm_disk_01.dd and usb_clone.dd files to /home/ga/Cases/Archive_Triage_2024/Export/ and add the exported vm_disk_01.dd as a Disk Image data source to the case. Document the MD5 hashes of all four files (server_backup.dat, payloads.zip, vm_disk_01.dd, and usb_clone.dd) in a pipe-delimited report at /home/ga/Reports/archive_provenance.txt using the header 'FILE|MD5'.
